name: Streamarr
description: Stream Usenet content on demand through the Streamarr Core Server. Thin adapter — no download-to-disk.
overview: Surfaces the Streamarr Core Server's Usenet search results inside Jellyfin and makes them playable through Jellyfin's transcoding pipeline.

versions.changelog: Import Sonarr/Radarr quality profiles and custom-format scores, rank releases against a portable custom-format subset, brand library artwork with cached Streamarr badges, add a per-stream diagnostics page, and add a Swiftfin playback-compatibility shim.
Cut cold-start playback latency with NNTP connection warmup, startup read-ahead, cached media probes and RAR materialization, release-registration hydration, and escalated ffprobe analysis.
Add streaming history, ephemeral library management, cache-backed playback, operational monitoring, and optional Pushover notifications.
Add resilient article retries and caching, provider speed tests, indexer-only proxying, client-reachable stream URLs, and improved Jellyfin discovery.
Fix Jellyfin movie playback and TV season/episode navigation, with correct remote-item availability and hierarchy metadata.
Restore Jellyfin Web grouped movie and series search compatibility, with safer query constraint handling and bounded plugin diagnostics.
Lazy TV series and season discovery in Jellyfin, hardened release ownership, and TMDB API Read Access Token support.
Semantic TMDB search aliases, canonical metadata and artwork, and release-gated Jellyfin discovery.
M5 thin-slice: playback via IMediaSourceProvider, pinned-work bootstrap, playback event reporting.
